ariaSpec.usage: The root list element of the treeview.
The ul element that wraps child nodes.
The li element rendered for a tree node.
Announces the expanded state of the node.
Announces the checked state of the node when checkboxes are enabled.
Announces the selected state of the node when selection is enabled.
The checkbox input must have an accessible name matching the treeview item text.
The checkbox input must not be in the tab order. Keyboard interaction is handled by the treeitem.

kbSpec.behavior: Selects the focused tree view item when the selection mode is single or multiple. When the selection mode is multiple and there are other selected items, they get deselected.
Checks the checkbox of the TreeView node.
Goes to the previous tree node. The focus is moved to the previous node and its tabindex is set to `0`.
Goes to the next tree node. The focus is moved to the next node and its tabindex is set to `0`.
If the node is expanded, collapses it and the focus remains on the item. If the node is collapsed, the focus is moved to its parent.
If the node is collapsed, expands it and the focus remains on the item. If the node is expanded, the focus is moved to the first child node.
Moves the focus to the first node in the tree without opening or closing a node.
Moves the focus to the last node in the tree that is focusable without opening a node.
Selects the focused item. When the item is already selected, it gets deselected.
Typing `M` or any other printable character focuses the next or the first item in the list.
